itemListElement.reviewBody:
Hi all, this is my honest review!
I studied here from my kindergarten to 12th grade. From my experience, all I can say is that it was a bitter-sweet experience on a whole. The primary building is good and well maintained. Had some of the amazing moments here. But when it comes to the secondary building, it is average to not good. Especially 11th and 12th grade is seriously not good here, all they do is extreme partiality among different set of students. There should be equal opportunities provided to all and there are less or almost no extra-curricular activities. The dance and music teachers basically look out for exterior look of a student and no talent at all, I've seen many getting rejected because of it even though they have great talent(really very much disheartened and disappointed because of such a unpleasant act). Today's generation is the future and treating a student(or any person whatsoever) like this is extremely bad. There's a specific teacher in 11th and 12th grade belonging to science faculty(not willing to mention his name), all he ever did was demotivate the students just because they needed help in that particular subject or area of focus. He only focused on a "certain" set of students and disregarded others. It is really sad to see all of it happen. There is partiality, discrimination and most importantly racism prevalent here. If you want your kid to have protected and good environment, please avoid this school, mainly for 11th and 12th grade.

Thank you!

I would like to describe about a teacher in this school,
Her name is Renupuri, She is the oldest of the teachers. She should retire by the this time but she hasn't. To be honest majority of the teachers here are 50+ in age. She has lost her ability to walk, read properly. She has no patience, she always threatens children emotionally and mentally. She always talks about negative qualities in other teachers. In fact she spent 1 period scolding and swearing about Kannada lecturer.
If any teacher is reading this comment, never trust Renupuri

Worst school ever, took the money before hand and now they're not even refunding the money from past 2months.

All the school faculties are ignorant and not helpful to resolve any issue, not even listening to the parents

One of the worst schools in Bangalore, high school fees, and every year they are increasing by 10% , when we ask for a reason, there is no proper response from school. The vice principal who sits in venkat branch is extremely rude. When suggested to include more of sport activities she asked us to find another school. The teaching standards have fallen all time low. Principal does not give time to meet the parents and hear their Grievances. Dirty toilets. No proper play ground for kids in venkat branch.

1. As Good as Govt School.
2. Book Fee, Uniform Fee, Academic Fee for next year is collected even before kid writes final exam.
3. Anytime Anymonth Anymoment you can get admission in this school.
4. No entrance exam are conducted, only money matters. You pay and get seat.
5. There is no forum for parents to interact with school management. No matter how severe the problem is.
6. Fee structure for the level of facilities and education provided is too high.
7. When you send email to school only admission related email will be addressed and followed up and replied to.
8. Even though anyone wants to help or suggest or guide school. They are not ready for it.
